data.content: Shipment review approved. `origin/main` now resolves to `a1cbe5c33d64783f86cd63b4c001952afb1fd539`, the knot carries the shipped `commit:` and `branch:` tags, and the remote workflows attached to that commit completed successfully (`CI` and `Coverage Badge`).
